name: Guardrails (Team)
description: Security, compliance and privacy controls for team AI-assisted development. Includes session locking, contributor role separation, and shared audit records.

post_install_actions.description: Review CLAUDE.md and confirm the security rules match your project requirements.
post_install_actions.why: CLAUDE.md contains rules that govern Claude Code behaviour. They should be reviewed before your first session.

post_install_actions.description: Open .claude/guardrails/team-config.json and add the names or identifiers of all project contributors.
post_install_actions.why: Team guardrails uses this list to assign manual actions and enforce the framework owner / contributor role split.

commands.name: /security-review
commands.description: Run an OWASP checklist review of recent changes.
